transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Are you going to the student art exhibit this evening?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. My roommate has several paintings on display, so I want to support her.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the woman going to the art exhibit?

questions.prompt: Why is the woman going to the art exhibit?
questions.explanation: She says her roommate has paintings on display and she wants to support her.
questions.evidence: My roommate has several paintings on display, so I want to support her.
